section_title: Right of auditor to attend general meeting-All notices of an other communications relating to any general meeting
content:
217. Right of auditor to attend general meeting-All notices of an other communications relating to any general meeting
of a company which any member of the company is entitled to have sent to him shall also be forwarded to the auditor of the
company, and the auditor shall be entitled to attend any general meeting and to be heard at any general meeting which he
attends on any part of the business which concerns him as auditor.
